name: Italian Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and olive oil in a large frying pan. Heat over medium heat.
2. Add onions and sauté for one minute, stirring occasionally.
3. Add carrots, celery, mushrooms, and parsley. Cook, stirring frequently for 5 minutes.
4. Crumble the ground beef into the pan and cook, stirring frequently until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle flour over the meat and stir until well blended.
6. Stir in tomato puree.
7. Gradually add red wine, stirring constantly to avoid splattering.
8. Add beef broth and season with salt, pepper, garlic, oregano, and any other desired spices.
9. Simmer for about 1 hour or until the sauce has thickened, stirring occasionally.
10. Serve over pasta. Each serving contains approximately 1 cup of sauce.
